title: Effects of Russian Electrical Stimulation  on Knee Osteoarthritis
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"gjpd","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d85qk","text":"This protocol outlines a randomized controlled trial (RCT) to evaluate the effectiveness of Russian electrical stimulation–enhanced quadriceps strengthening exercise compared with strengthening exercise alone in 70 older adults with knee osteoarthritis, assessing pain, muscle strength, and functional ability over 6 months. The intervention consists of Russian electrical stimulation (50 Hz sinusoidal symmetric pulses, 400 μs pulse duration, 10 ms on/off bursts, 25% duty cycle: 5 s on / 20 s off) combined with a 6-week conventional quadriceps strengthening program. Outcomes will be measured using the VAS scale, pressure pain threshold via algometer, automated portable dynamometer, the Western Ontario and McMaster Universities Osteoarthritis Index (WOMAC), and the 6-Minute Walk Test. This study includes both genders, records baseline OA duration and severity, and evaluates multiple clinically relevant outcomes. It is expected to demonstrate that adding Russian electrical stimulation to strengthening exercise significantly improves pain, muscle strength, and particularly functional outcomes, with sustained benefits across gender limitations.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4kc3v","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"p8ke","text":"\nGuidelines for Protocol Execution","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":1,"length":33}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7q6vt","text":"To ensure precise execution of the randomized controlled trial evaluating Russian electrical stimulation–enhanced quadriceps strengthening exercise for older adults with knee osteoarthritis, the following guidelines must be followed:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"253hk","text":"Study Oversight:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6njtq","text":"Conduct the single-center RCT at the Department of Physiotherapy, Jashore University of Science and Technology.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3e9p2","text":"Randomize participants using block randomization by a computer-generated sequence with allocation concealment via sealed opaque envelopes.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"85htt","text":"Blinding:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5mcel","text":"Outcome assessors measuring pain, muscle strength, and functional ability (VAS, PPT, dynamometer, WOMAC) must be blinded to group allocation.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ckng6","text":"Participants will be blinded about group allocation procedure, and therapists cannot be blinded due to the nature of Russian electrical stimulation.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cl3em","text":"Training:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c8dmn","text":"Physiotherapists delivering exercises must have certified training in quadriceps strengthening and Russian electrical stimulation.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4kmg2","text":"Assessors must be trained in VAS scoring, pressure pain threshold measurement, dynamometer use, and WOMAC assessment.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e5ggo","text":"Participant Screening:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":22}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"auoc2","text":"Include older adults aged 60+ years with clinically diagnosed knee osteoarthritis, according to ACR criteria and Kellgren–Lawrence grade.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f9c7r","text":"Exclude participants with contraindications to electrical stimulation, severe comorbidities, or recent knee surgery.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cs835","text":"Intervention Delivery:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":22}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8ehgp","text":"Control Group: Deliver 6-week supervised quadriceps strengthening program (3 sessions/week, 45–50 min each; warm-up, strengthening, non-specific control activities, pain-free positioning, cool-down).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":14}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5gse0","text":"Experimental Group: Deliver identical strengthening program with additional 10–15 min Russian electrical stimulation per session (50 Hz, 10 ms on/off bursts, 400 μs pulse duration, 25% duty cycle, at maximum patient tolerance).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2u6vp","text":"Outcome Assessments:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":20}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"amujl","text":"Assess pain (VAS, PPT), quadriceps strength (dynamometer), and functional ability (WOMAC and 6MWT) at baseline, 6 weeks, and follow-up after 12 weeks from post-treatment assessment.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ctf18","text":"Assessments conducted by blinded assessors to reduce bias.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3nks4","text":"Data Management:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2otef","text":"Collect data using structured forms; store anonymized data in a secure, password-protected database.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"740hu","text":"Conduct weekly audits to ensure accuracy and completeness.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"fbbki","text":"Materials","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"67sr5","text":"1. Intervention Equipment","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":25}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bpthu","text":"Russian current stimulator (50 Hz, 400 μs, 10 ms bursts, 25% duty cycle)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9ipns","text":"Self-adhesive electrodes (5×5 cm) with electrode gel","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dm4o3","text":"Lead wires and a stable power supply","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7k3gg","text":"TheraBands (yellow, red, green, blue) and ankle weights (0.5–2 kg)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"673er","text":"Treatment plinths, chairs, and a timer","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cj8n1","text":"2. Outcome Assessments","type":"header-three","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":22}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2rjid","text":"Visual Analog Scale (VAS) forms (English/Bengali) and pressure algometer","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6vcfn","text":"Hand-held dynamometer (ActivForce 2TM or equivalent)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":35,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e6eh1","text":"WOMAC questionnaires (English/Bengali)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7fdcd","text":"6-Minute Walk Test (6MWT) corridor markers and measuring tape","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"33uqb","text":"3. Data Management","type":"header-three","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":18}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fe9gp","text":"Data collection forms (VAS, PPT, strength, WOMAC, 6MWT)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2hktt","text":"Adverse event reporting forms","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4v4ev","text":"Computer with database software, secure external/cloud storage","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9bbl1","text":"Locked filing cabinet for paper records","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aeois","text":"4. Safety and Emergency","type":"header-three","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":23}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1mvo4","text":"First aid kit and sharps container","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1l8f1","text":"Hand sanitizer and disinfectants","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e3kd3","text":"Emergency contact list","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"rsp9","text":"5. Participant Materials","type":"header-three","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":24}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ebma6","text":"Informed consent forms (English/Bengali)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5evvb","text":"Patient information sheets (English/Bengali)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
